description.en: Compact and lightweight portable EV chargers for on-the-go charging. 3.5KW to 11KW power range.
description.zh: 紧凑轻便的便携式电动汽车充电器，随时随地充电。功率范围3.5KW至11KW。

description.en: Smart home wallbox chargers with APP control and Dynamic Load Balance. 7KW to 22KW for EU, 7.5KW to 12KW Level 2 for US market.
description.zh: 智能家用壁挂充电桩，APP控制和动态负载均衡。欧标7-22KW，美标Level 2 7.5-12KW。

description.en: OCPP-enabled commercial chargers with MID certified meters. Includes public wallbox, twin charger, pedestal, and advertising series.
description.zh: 支持OCPP的商用充电桩，MID认证计量。包括商用壁挂、双枪、立柱和广告系列。

description.en: High-power DC fast chargers from 30KW Mini DC to 720KW Split Type. CCS2/CCS1/NACS/GB/T/CHAdeMO compatible.
description.zh: 大功率直流快充，从30KW迷你DC到720KW分体式。兼容CCS2/CCS1/NACS/GB/T/CHAdeMO。

description.en: Integrated energy storage and charging solutions with V2G capability, solar integration, and smart energy management.
description.zh: 集成储能和充电解决方案，支持V2G、光伏集成和智能能源管理。
